figure_caption: Intake rehearsal from operator dry-run templates to evidence-pack replay, showing preserved hashes/manifests for valid synthetic-safe packages and blocked handoff mutations before any current artifact can reopen.
interpretation: The intake rehearsal preserves the handoff for filled shadow/canary packages and a synthetic counterfactual control, then blocks stale hashes, manifest mutations, threshold remapping, attestation changes, and post-dry-run privacy columns before replay. It remains synthetic-safe and creates no actual reopen candidate.
